title: Gond
bodyText:
God of craft; the civic religion of Koviz. Symbol: a **toothed cog with 4 spokes** — every person a cog in the machine that keeps the town alive. PROGRESS · WORK · INNOVATION · COMMITMENT. Spoke directly to G, Yena, and Roman: told them **Lathandar had been captured** and pointed them at the cult — the rescue mission the party is now completing a generation later.

# Why he went silent (grill 2026-07-09)
**Silenced / hunted — a diminished ally.** The same forces suppressing the gods (the false-Torm, Kol's cult, the Pool's pull) have been muffling Gond; he went quiet to survive and can now only **nudge from the shadows** (his "one last time" for Brolin, S13; the compass through G). Even the god who started the rescue is nearly powerless — he's rooting for the party but can't act openly. Fits the gods-shift ([[thread-gods-shift]]).
